# Summit X

> Luxury alpine travel brand. A sub-brand of Icon Private Collection.

Summit X curates exclusive alpine experiences for discerning travellers — private chalets, heli-ski programmes, guided expeditions, and boutique mountain lodges. Every property and programme is personally selected and arranged by our team.

## What we offer

- **Alpine chalets** — private luxury chalets in premier ski and mountain destinations, from intimate bolt-holes to grand multi-chalet estates
- **Heli-ski programmes** — exclusive helicopter skiing in remote terrain, arranged with certified guides and full logistical support
- **Expeditions** — guided alpine and mountain expeditions combining adventure with exceptional accommodation
- **Mountain lodges** — boutique lodges positioned at altitude, combining comfort with access to wilderness
- **Destinations** — curated destination guides for the world's finest alpine locations

## The Edit

The Edit is the Summit X journal: editorial coverage of alpine culture, destination guides, property spotlights, and travel intelligence for mountain enthusiasts.

## Enquiries

All programmes are bespoke and price-on-request. To enquire:
- Email: summitx@iconprivatecollection.com
- Website: https://summitx.iconprivatecollection.com

## About Icon Private Collection

Summit X is part of Icon Private Collection, a luxury travel group specialising in curated private properties and experiences worldwide.
